stemHtml: Prior to refuelling, fire precautions that shall be observed are…

options.a: aircraft must be more than 10 metres from radar or HF radio equipment under test.
options.b: Ground Power Units (GPU) are not to be operated.
options.c: passengers may be boarded (traversing the refuelling zone) providing suitable fire extinguishers are readily available.
options.d: all bonding and connections to the earth terminal between ground equipment and the aircraft should be made before filler caps are removed.
